name: Bu Xie
page_title: Bu Xie 步協 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: When Bu Zhi died, his son Bu Xie was heir. Xie resumed his father’s military command, and was promoted to General who Consoles the Army. After Bu Xie’s death, Bu Ji, his son, inherited his marquisate.

sections.short-biography: Son of Bu Zhi, became General who Consoles the Army.

full_text:
Bu Xie 步協
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bu Xie (步協). Son of Bu Zhi, became General who Consoles the Army. Bu Xie was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Bu Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
When Bu Zhi died, his son Bu Xie was heir. Xie resumed his father’s military command, and was promoted to General who Consoles the Army. After Bu Xie’s death, Bu Ji, his son, inherited his marquisate.
